{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.6": 5, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The revised version addresses a key internal contradiction and makes several clarifications, but does not walk the entire argument chain end-to-end for consistency.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is improved with clear and concise language, and the overall readability is enhanced.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty is disclosed for two issues (Lyapunov construction assumptions and recovery claim), but the technical details of the proof are not visible to the judge.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced in the revised version.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some technical details remain unverified."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "R1.6": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.7,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The revised version addresses a key internal contradiction and makes several clarifications, but does not walk the entire argument chain end-to-end for consistency.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is improved with clear and concise language, and the overall readability is enhanced.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for two issues (Lyapunov construction assumptions and recovery claim), but the technical details of the proof are not visible to the judge.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced in the revised version.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but some technical details remain unverified.
